subtitle.ja: 「カヌー」の完成形から始めます。人差し指の輪に親指を上から入れ、糸を引き下げます。親指背の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: Begin from the finished form of “A Canoe.” Insert both thumbs from above into the index loops and draw the strings down; the strings on the backs of the thumbs fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指向こう側の糸を下から取り、親指の輪から引き出します。親指で引き下げていた糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the far little-finger strings and draw them out of the thumb loops; the strings that were being pulled down by the thumbs fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the little-finger strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、人差し指上の糸を超えて、人差し指と親指の間にある2本の糸の上側にある糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, move over the index-upper strings and pick up from below the upper of the two strings that lie between the index fingers and thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の輪に人差し指を上から入れ、人差し指上の糸を人差し指で上から取って完成です
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the little-finger loops, move over and pick down the index-upper strings, and show the finished figure.
